47370.name: Stonework Tunnels
47370.description: A narrow passage through the stoneworks ventures west and north here, and from the north drifts a faint hint of rushing water. The floor here is well worn, and the remnants of a gate's bolting can be detected upon the walls.

47371.name: Stonework Tunnels
47371.description: The tunnel ends abruptly here in a wide, convex ledge overlooking an endless darkness far below. A faint echo of rushing water drifts up from below. A narrow crawlspace lay adjacent to the west, and a slight blue aura surrounds the edges of the tunnel's end where open space begins. A nauseating odor wafts by.

47372.name: Stonework Crawlspace
47372.description: The tunnel ends here in a miniscule crawlspace populated by the husks of small, formerly living things, and the dung of ogres and batwights. A tiny fissue in the ground forms a niche that appears as if it could contain a few small trinkets.

47373.name: Winding Ledge
47373.description: You tread lightly along a narrow, winding ledge in the darkness. Small winged creatures flit back and forth, occasionally diving at your intrusive form. Below, a pit of jagged spires can just barely be discerned. Passage is possible to the west and to the east.

47380.name: Stonework Tunnels
47380.description: A narrow passage through the stonework tunnels goes east and west here, adjacent a large misty cavern. Thin tendrils of ebon mist creep along the walls, and here you feel slightly drained.

47381.name: Stonework Tunnels
47381.description: Odd markings in even patterns cover the stonework surfaces of the walls here. To the north, a series of bars, also, stone, serve to form a gate through which can be seen a small, dingy cell. Exits through the tunnel lay to the east and to the west.

47382.name: Stonework Tunnels
47382.description: Tunnels. Twists. Turns. Stone and more stone. It could go on forever, but you're sure it won't. Then again it may not matter; the creator of this particular place seems determined to see you die within it. Passages lead east and south.

47383.name: Stonework Tunnels
47383.description: Tunnels. Twists. Turns. Stone and more stone. It could go on forever, but you're sure it won't. Then again it may not matter; the creator of this particular place seems determined to see you die within it. A sulferous pit rests to the south, and passages offer further misery to the north and west.

47384.name: Stonework Tunnels
47384.description: A narrow tunnel provides passage west and east here within the stoneworks. Here and there along the walls are the remnants of age-old etchings, but what they depict remains a mystery.

47385.name: Stonework Tunnels
47385.description: On an on the stonework tunnelwork twists and turns, finally coming to an abrupt end here before a large, rusty iron gate. A pale violet glow casts shadows from beyond the gate, and there's yet more of that damned translucent mist bothering itself with about your feet. Warm gold veins gleam faintly beneath the surface.

47387.name: Pit within the Stoneworks
47387.description: Crumbling blocks of sulpher are exposed here within an unnatural depression within the stonework tunnels. This musta been some blast.

47388.name: A Pit of Spikes
47388.description: Jagged conical spires rise from the floor of an acrid pit, full of decaying remains. Heat rises from the ground and soft gasps of steam erupt from cracks at irregular intervals. Something seems to be... flowing... just below the surface.

47389.name: Murky Pit
47389.description: The foul stench of murky green gas pervades this small pit. Nestled unobtrusively between a copse of small trees, you might easily have missed this place were it not for the nauseating aroma. You could clamber out of the pit and join the path to the south, or stay and play with its occupant.

47392.name: Stone Pit
47392.description: You've tumbled into a cramped stone pit within the tunnels. A scattering of typically gory muck and assorted bits of formerly living detrius cover the ground. The pit is deep, but perhaps not too deep to climb out of with some skill.

47396.name: Crumbled Passage
47396.description: A pile of rocks blocks further passage here. From the looks of them, its the result of a recent cave-in. Here and there a stray leg, head, or arm can be seen poking out from the pile, slowly being devoured by the multitude of insects inhabiting this dank little corner of the underworld. An eagle-emblazoned totem pulses with a serene, mystical energy.

47397.name: A Narrow Cavern
47397.description: The waters of the underworld flow swiftly through a narrow cavern, having forked away from the primary course. To the south a jumbled pile of jagged rocks rise up from the churning river, and to the north this shallow tributary continues.

47154.name: Slope Path
47154.description: A path upon the slope narrows near an earthen wound in the hillside to the west. Below, passage appears a matter of risk at best, and a matter flight at worst. Above, the ground levels near the edge of a worn road.

47155.name: Stonework Cavern
47155.description: You stand within a large, mist-filled cavern within the earth. The mist swirls all about, obscuring your vision. High above, the edges of some kind of structure can be discerned. A narrow tunnel entrance presents itself southward, and the cavern extends in all directions.

47156.name: Stonework Tunnel
47156.description: You tread through a straight and cluttered tunnel travelling east and west, far beneath the earth. Ahead a narrow opening exits into a misty cavern of inteterminable size. Water drips freely from above, the echo of the falling drops the only sound present.

47157.name: Stonework Tunnel
47157.description: A darkened and damp tunnel is blocked here by a solid old gate of iron set into the roughstone walls. The tunnel continues eastward, thin pools collecting upon the floor as water drips steadily from above. Further down the tunnel, the stonework begins to smooth into obviously crafted patterns.

47158.name: Roughstone Tunnel
47158.description: Stone meets earth here where a passage downward ends, before a large iron gate blocking a tunnel venturing westward beneath the ground. Roots hang down from overhead, tendrils draped along the walls like curtains.

47159.name: Spunroot Tunnels
47159.description: The tunnel of earth and tuberous growth ends here, rocks and stone beginning to jut out from the otherwise fungus and root-covered walls. A small circle of purposely placed stone marks a narrow passage downward.

47161.name: Narrow Passage
47161.description: Layers of slime cover the rough stone walls of this narrow passage, which extends eastward away from a set of spiraling stairs. It ends before a poorly constructed door of rotting wood.

47298.name: In the Underground River
47298.description: Foul, murky water rushes by, pummeling you. Luck has smiled upon you this day, as you seem to have landed within a circle of jagged rocks which prevent the water from carrying you and your belongings off into oblivion. Mashed into crevices between the rocks here, are the remains of a skeleton. Over a series of loose stepping stones, it appears possible to reach a narrow staircase leading up into a tunnel of crafted stonework.

47325.name: Filthy Tunnel
47325.description: A maze of narrow openings lead in several directions within this filthy tunnel beneath the stoneworks of old Napenthe. Most appear too narrow for travel. Dark iron streaks run thick through the rock.

47326.name: Stonework Tunnel
47326.description: A maze of narrow openings lead in several directions within this filthy tunnel beneath the stoneworks of old Napenthe. Most appear too narrow for travel. Through a smooth opening in the stone here, the sound of rushing water echoes, coupled with the clear and present scent of decay.

47327.name: Oddly Glowing Chamber
47327.description: Two passages within the stoneworks intersect here at a small chamber, its walls worn smooth. Along the northern wall are a series of evenly spaced banded markings, seven in total. Tiny pebbles are scattered at the base of the wall, and an odd chill seeps up from the ground here.

47328.name: Stonework Staircase
47328.description: Smoothly polished stones twist and curl downward, away from the tunnels beneath Napenthe. Trickles of fetid water stream across the steps, threatening to send you tumbling down into the vast darkness below. Dark iron streaks run thick through the rock.

47329.name: Stonework Staircase
47329.description: Cracks appear in the steps to swallow the narrow rivulets of water streaming from above. The sound of rushing water echoes through the stepped passage, which terminates abruptly here. Beneath you can barely make out a jumble of rocks and the roil of water flowing past. It looks like you could jump safely down.

47330.name: Before the Broken Gate
47330.description: Hanging crookedly from broken hinges are the remnants of a crude iron gate near the tunnel entrance. The odor of decay merges with the quiet tone of rushing water from afar, and through the gateway the tunnel splits.

47331.name: Filthy Tunnel
47331.description: The rancid corpsi of small, mangled animals decay in piles along the walls of this filthy tunnel. Two passages lay open ahead, splitting east and west.

47332.name: Stonework Tunnel
47332.description: A maze of narrow openings lead in several directions within this filthy stonework tunnel. Ogre droppings and crushed bone litter the floor.

47333.name: Stonework Tunnel
47333.description: Tunnels through the stonework beneath old Napenthe cross here, narrowing and widening at odd angles. The faint sound of rushing water echoes through the passages, and a distinct odor of decay wafts past.

47334.name: Stonework Chamber
47334.description: Here the tunnel widens and rises, opening into a large, bell-shaped chamber within the stoneworks. Strewn all about are the debris of ages long past; axe- handles, wooden carts, the bones of un-named vermin and the ragged remnants of many an ogre's dressings. Towards the northern end of the chamber are arrayed a set of stone pedestals, chipped and worn. A passage winds westward.

105.name: Stone Pit
105.description: You've tumbled into a cramped stone pit within the tunnels. A scattering of typically gory muck and assorted bits of formerly living detrius cover the ground. The pit is deep, but perhaps not too deep to climb out of with some skill.

110.name: A Pit of Spikes
110.description: Jagged conical spires rise from the floor of an acrid pit, full of decaying remains. Heat rises from the ground and soft gasps of steam erupt from cracks at irregular intervals. Something seems to be... flowing... just below the surface.

111.name: Stone Pit
111.description: You've tumbled into a cramped stone pit within the tunnels. A scattering of typically gory muck and assorted bits of formerly living detrius cover the ground. The pit is deep, but perhaps not too deep to climb out of with some skill.

47160.name: Overgrown Path
47160.description: You stumble through an overgrown area upon a gentle sloping mountainside near Napenthe. A thin trail leads down the slope, rocks and branches strewn about making for a treacherous path.
